items.caption: A digital flyer for a financial services company named utfcu. it features a man in a suit and tie, smiling and looking directly at the viewer. the flyer has a dark blue background with a gradient that fades to white at the top and bottom. the company's logo is prominently displayed at the top right corner. the text on the flyer includes a slogan "your retirement our focus!" and the name of the financial planner, john fawaz, along with his contact information. below the contact details, there are bullet points highlighting the services offered, such as through lpl financial, member finra/sipc, and insurance products offered through lpl financial or it licensed affiliates. the style of the image is professional and informational, designed to advertise the services of the financial planner.
